_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: Y100 treatment of U87-MG cells for 30 minutes to 24 hours resulted in the presence of superoxide radicals in the mitochondria...Y100 induced superoxide is detectable within 30 minutes
details: Induced mitochondrial superoxide radicals detectable within 30 minutes of treatment and caused DNA damage as indicated by gamma-H2AX presence
